title: hieracium glaucinum var. basalticum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum var. basalticum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plants family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum var. basalticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited research and potential side effects.
